Gateway Timeout

The gateway timed out while waiting for a response from the Overpass API
upstream. The query may have exceeded the requested `[timeout:25]` budget
or the server may be under load.

Please try again in a moment. If the problem persists, consider narrowing
the query bbox or increasing the QL `[timeout:N]` directive.

Synthetic fixture — Overpass returns a plain-text 504 body under nginx/apache.
Format follows RESEARCH.md §2 and matches the reverse-proxy 504 responses
observed on public Overpass mirrors under stress.
